race.comment: Tricky race to kick off the card with many of these babies facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade I'LLTELLYOUANYTIME (9) resumes here but showed enough in her first preparation to warrant serious consideration in a race like this. Has the most race experience in this field and a strong showing while fresh would not surprise. Connections had such a high opinion of WARREGO RIVER (14) that they debuted her in a $500,000 race where she didn't measure up. Tuned up for this with a recent trial and must respect the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. FAIR SHAKE (3) didn't feature in a Listed race on debut but will find this assignment much easier. In the mix. PROFITEUR'S FIL (5) has shown ability at the trials and any market support must be noted. CONCERNED (2) is a recent trial winner who should be kept safe.
